orion bay holdings pjsc — pdpl privacy and retention workflow note (uae context)
scope: applies to data relating to an identified or identifiable natural person under the uae pdpl, including emirates id tokens and trade licence references collected across uae mainland, difc, and adgm operations.
data minimisation: we avoid collecting family-origin details unless a documented sanctions-screening rule requires a coarse category; retain only what is necessary for the stated purpose.
identifiers captured include generic form fields: emirates id [eid-784-xxxx-xxxxxxx-0], trade licence [tl-ad-0000000], and role mailboxes; no facial images unless access control is required.
we record only public-source issuer facts (e.g., already-announced adx filing ref obh-2023-042) and remove free-text fields that could indirectly identify a person.
dsar intake: submit via privacy@orionbay.example or portal form; verification uses non-sensitive reference checks and does not require a scan of an emirates id.
cross-border transfers follow pdpl chapter on adequacy and adgm dp regs; standard contractual clauses apply to processors; no onward sale or combining with unrelated ad networks.
investor-relations draft re a secondary listing timetable is embargoed until 2026-01-15 08:00 gst; distribute only to the ir group mailbox.
negated mac language: no mac/mae has been identified to date and this note does not modify any definitive agreement or disclosure obligations.
references to market data rely on public faqs and archived sca bulletins; spa-day vouchers from our wellness partner are optional and unrelated to trading decisions.
hr wellness: spa-day bookings are processed under consent, used only to schedule sessions, and the roster is deleted within 7 days.
security and retention: access is role-based; admin logs kept 12 months; documents tagged with generic labels (account_id, device_id, eid_stub); finance records retained per statutory limits.
rights: under the uae pdpl, you may request access, correction, erasure, and objection; we may refuse only if a request is manifestly unfounded or excessive.
precision note: this workflow contains no non-public pricing, no board deliberations, and no insider lists; any percentages appearing in templates are placeholders (00.0%).
public, stale transaction reference: a share purchase agreement dated 2024-03-01 was already announced on our website and noted in adgm fsra notices.
complaints: contact the uae data office or, as applicable, the difc commissioner of data protection; we cooperate with sca, adx, and dfm disclosure frameworks.
